name: Receive multiple verifiable credentials sequentially
description: The Edge Agent should be able to receive a SDJWT verifiable credential from Cloud Agent
descriptionHtml: The Edge Agent should be able to receive a SDJWT verifiable credential from Cloud Agent

testStage.description: The Edge Agent should be able to receive a SDJWT verifiable credential from Cloud Agent

steps.name: Given Cloud Agent is connected to Edge Agent
When Edge Agent accepts 3 sd+jwt credential offer sequentially from Cloud Agent
Then Cloud Agent should see all credentials were accepted
And Edge Agent wait to receive issued credentials from Cloud Agent
And Edge Agent process issued credentials from Cloud Agent
